templates.name: When will I receive my refund?
templates.content: We provide a prepaid return label/QR code for you to ship back your return. Once USPS scans the return, your return will process and you will receive an email confirmation with your refund. Please allow 3-5 business days for the funds to appear back in your account.

templates.content: We don't currently have a store but definitely keep an eye out!

templates.name: Retroactive discount request
templates.content: We are able to apply the discount code only up to 12 hours after placing the order. If it's less than 12 hours, the best way to handle this is to contact us directly through this link https://support.getcasely.com/coupons-promotions-sales/forgot-to-apply-a-promo-coupon-code# Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: How to clean Casely cases?
templates.content: With lighter color front bumpers, discoloration is possible but not common. To clean the case, you will need to remove your phone from the case first. The best way to clean would be to use a disinfectant wipe and gently rub it on the discolored area. It could take some force but it should come off or remove the majority of the discoloration. If that doesn't remove the discoloration, you can try using a small amount of rubbing alcohol on a paper towel, just enough to dampen the cloth, to clean the discolored area. These two solutions should have your case looking good as new! If neither of these suggestions works to clean the case, please let us know, and we are more than happy to help figure out another solution!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $30. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: The buttons are hard to press with my case on
templates.content:
We have an easy fix for that! Our cases are designed to be a snug and tight fight to your phone to offer maximum protection. However, the buttons can be a bit tight when first applied. With the case on your phone, try lifting the case and stretching it slightly away from the phone. Doing this will help relieve the pressure the case is putting on your buttons and will get it working properly.

If you have tried the above recommendation and are still experiencing an issue, please click here https://www.getcasely.com/pages/returns-exchanges

templates.content: I'm afraid we cannot make any changes or cancel orders after 1 hour of the order being placed. If it's less than an hour, the best way to handle this is to contact us directly through this link https://www.getcasely.com/pages/contact-us Our team is happy to help!

templates.content: Our processing time takes 1 business day and we usually ship via USPS. Once shipped it will take 2-4 business days for domestic orders and 3-8 business days for international orders. We also offer expedited shipping options.

templates.name: Will my Power 2.0 case work with my Apple CarPlay?
templates.content: Our Power 2.0 cases will work with most Apple CarPlays, but since there are many types of cars and models, we cannot guarantee the cases will work with all of them. The cases will connect best with authentic Apple iPhone cords/chargers.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at info@getcasely.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Are Casely cases protective?
templates.content: Casely cases are engineered with high-quality (but never bulky!) protective materials. Our cases are primarily made with a hard protective material called polycarbonate. If you are looking for ultimate protection we'd recommend going with our Bold Collection cases. They are military-grade protection up to 8 feet drops.

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: All orders ship from our warehouse in Indianapolis, Indiana.
